title: Fighting Fires With Figures, These Experts Are Trying to Stop Europe from Burning
summary_full: A team of engineers, foresters and scientists is helping the continent prepare for wildfires from a giant science park in Italy. Their arsenal includes satellites, weather models and expert analysis.
summary_public: A team of engineers, foresters and scientists is helping the continent prepare for wildfires from a giant science park in Italy. Their arsenal includes satellites, weather models and expert analysis.

IT.label: positive
IT.evidence: helping the continent prepare for wildfires from a giant science park in Italy
